TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Wufeng, title = Wufeng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wufeng} }

S.FORM: Wufeng Wufeng a sakuwan ku Hsinchu. kumud nu kalesakan, 210.04 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 139.96 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 139.96 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 5,114 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,895 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,517 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 88% (Tayal, Saysiyat) ku kasabinawlan. u Atayal atu Saysiyat ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Wufeng mala 4 a cuwen atu 31 ku niyazu'. kina 31 a niyazu'sa, Maybalay , Kyu'ang , Oro'raw: , Mayl'ux , Mayhuman , R'ra' , Sipazi' , Tatoba' , Sansama:an , Sayie , Ip'ipa'an bato , Yohae' , Sansaru , Ulay , Takunan , Trayan , Lwax khu' , Minse , R'uyan , Ruba' , Kawabata , Kahaehaeoan , Ngangihaw , Singaw , Blangaw , Heku' , Kukung , Mintuyu , Skaru , T'apan , Si'ung . Wufen (Ta-wan) šļĒŚ≥įťĄČ :ngňä fungňč hiongňčÔľõś≥įťõÖŤ™ě:Tatoba'ÔľõŤ≥ĹŚ§ŹŤ™ě:Tatoba'). Wuce buyu', itida i Wufun , Cudunce , paipufen sa kalalitemuhan a kitidaan, uTaywan nu cacayay a lasubu nu sakacacay a kayakayan a buyu', Wufen "Taywan ngayngay a kamu u hay-lu a ngalngalan, ngňä fungňč hiongňč, Atayal a mamu, Tatoba', Saisiyat a kamu, Tatoba'". u Taywan Sin-cuku nu cacayay a san-ti niyadu' itida i Sin-cuku nu nutipan, u Sin-cuku nu saadidi'ay a tademaw nu niyadu'an, atu Jianshi sakalecad nu Sin-cuku a santi niyadu'an. muenengay a tademaw u Taywan yincumin Atayal atu Saisiyat , idaw ku adidiay nu ngayngayan a binacadan atu ni kalepacawan nu hulam mabulaway nu tayniay a tademaw. waliyan sibiyaw tu Jianshi , timulan sibiyaw tu Miwli kin tay-an fen , nutipan sibiyaw tu Miw-li kin Nanzhuang , nutipan amisan katukuh i amis sibiyaw satu tu u Paipu fen , Cudun cen atu Hen-san niyadu' . Wufeng Wufeng cinsan pakincalan a kakitidaan a luma' nulwan nu babalaki. Cin-cun pakincalan tacen tusa a mihcaan Sia-ke'-luo masasuada henay, taylin ci Pucin-san-kuo taylan tayda itida mueneng. tacen sepatay (4)a mihcaan enem a bulad (6) cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (15) a demiad, ci cin-san-kuo taylan ku misabenisay tu nganganan nu kitidaan nu kincal a pangangan, patiden tu cinsan a luma' nu kincal, mala "„ā∑„É§„āę„É≠ÔľćťöėŚčáÁ∑ö"kakincalan nu kakitidaan. ta-cen pulu' a mihcaan pitu a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a demiad, misumad tu Cin-san nu kincal kakitidaan a luma' , ta-cen sabaw cacay a mihcaan sepat a bulad cacay a demiad, misumad tu Cin-san kincal a kakitidaan nu lalumaan, idaw kuni patideng tu cunca nu cacaya a sakakaay. nikudan ni kalepacawan, sumad han tu ku ngangan u cin-cun kincala kitidaan han. Sin-cu Wufeng cenyung aidangan Sin-cu Wufeng Cen-yung aidangan itida i Sin-cu-ku Wufeng , u sakanamuhan a tataydaan amidang. nu taydaay a midangay nu tademaw, idaw ku sananay a mitanengay nu masa wawaay henay nu masiluma'ay atu balakiay tu mapulung a tayda atu laluma'anay tayda mapulung midang, hinuki nu kilakilangan mahida miabibiay tu bangesis nu kilang. satabakiay nu picidekan u "tada' matumes tu nu adipawnay, maliyud nu matumesay a latem, kacelaman nu cilal mahida u cudad a kulit" mahida u Taywan a Cia-na-ta Sin-cuku a "kilangkilangan a tataydaan nu caculilan" bangcal nu tataydaan i pabaw taneng miadih tu nikatahekalan nu cilal atu masa babuybabuyan nu laten" tada caledes tu, caay tu kadengan ku caledes!" cincun wunsin a katinengan ni sulitan cin-cun ungsing itida i Sin-cu-ku Wufen taw-san a niyadu'an nu masa enalay a sasawacan, u yuncumin u Atayal atu Saisiyat nikapulungan a niyadu'an, kalingatuan i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tulu(1913), tawya nu dipun a zitay nu I'unsin a Lipun nu kical a cukaymasan, sisa pangangan han tu " cin-san ungsing ", saidaway nu "ungsing tatanengan a lalilucan" nuni kasinganganan u Sin-cu-ku nu saka walu a sakacacay nu aidangan a bangcal nu tataydaan. nu taydaay i wunsin nu midangay a tademaw, taneng makayda i tusaay nu mapacacuya a kayakayan , saka cacay a kayakay taneng makatukuh i labu nu buyu nu yungcumin a niyaduan, sakatusa a kayakayan besud sa katukuh i Cincun wunsin, taneng makatukuh i Talu lindaw', mapatumi' nu Sincu-ku maala ku balucu' nu tataydaan a midang. cin-cun ungsing saycidek nu nanum Cin-cun ungsing yadah ku tahekale sa nu buwakbuwak sananay a nemnem nu nanum, u akuti' nu nanum makaala tu sepat a bataan idaw ku walu (48) ku akuti', u PH nu cilemin han pitu. pitu ku nika cileminan, u nai'ay ku kulit nai'ay ku sanek a nu teban a tansuan ungsing, idaw ku sananay taneng misa bangcal tu bihed, misadit tu banges, mikudus tu udip sa. Cin-cun ungsing amica kunika kaydaan nu balad amalawpes, itidi i siwa tusa cacay (921) anika tabakiyay nu ninele mutahekal aca, aydaay a Cin-cun ungsing nu tapang nu tatangahan lawaan tu tu mukin ku panan kya madiput. yakuba' han itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2018) sabaw cacay a bulat tuni katenesan nu waluay a mihcaan nu Cin-cun wuncun malingatu aca pakatineng tu binawlan, idaw kuni patideng tu Cincuntan, katuuday a lalalilucan, atu payluma'an nu lalalilucan. siapa'aaidangan a umah tahcelem numasa bayubayu a ladem Sia-pa' aaidangan nu umah sabangcalay nu kasienawan aadihan u masabayubayuay nu ladem, itini inika tahekalan nu cilal atu kaceleman nu cilal u sakaadihan nu tuki a maadih, katukuhan tu tina tukiyan kanca katuud tu ku tademawan itida masilac miadih tu bangcal nu latem. munabaway a ladem i bayu nu tungduh mahida u adidi'ay a subal, datengen nu mita mahida mipacunaay tu balunga tu milakuud tu masakupa nu waneng a piyang a laden mahida' makatukuhay i nuayawan a dadipasan, balucu' ita mahida maka tukuhay tu i batad. tahceleman tu nu cilal macunus ku bangcal nu tapukuwang, inikudan nu buyu' u kalawlawan a cilal hamaw sa mala sumanahay haymaw sa musaluimeng langdaw satu ku tapukuwan, tu demidemiad mahida umidiznay kuni ka sumadan nu demiad a puyu kuni kadih nu bangcal u ka sa'timan nu aadihan. takelal ku tapukuwan labii i tida i aadihan tu bunac idaw ku micuyakuay tu bunaca a musakamuay. tawya a labii inai'ku latemlateman, hatidaay nu ahebal nu tapukuwan itini i matamataan paadih. hatiniay tu a kapah nu bunac, tada hatida tu ku bangcal. itini i kasienawan nu labii a tapukuwan idaw ku tuluay a malikatay nu bunac malalitin masa cacay a sasulitan u leihucu' a tatelacan, kainaian nu ladem a labii, hatidaay tu nu yadah a bunacan adihan katinenga tu kiya masa cacayay a bunacan. kasienawan nu labii salikatay a bunac han u tinlan a bunac?
S.PHON: wuf…ôŇč wuf…ôŇč a sakuwan ku ńßsin ¶ńßu. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺin-pan-ti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu paw-r~…ĺiw-ti ***.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **% (tajar~…ĺ, sajsijat) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u atajar~…ĺ atu sajsijat ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan wuf…ôŇč mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, majbar~…ĺaj , kju Ē~ °aŇč , oro Ē~ °raw: , majr~…ĺ Ē~ °u* , majńßuman , * Ē~ °ra Ē~ ° , sipazi Ē~ ° , tatoba Ē~ ° , sansama:an , saji…ô , ip Ē~ °ipa Ē~ °an bato , jońßa…ô Ē~ ° , sansaru , ur~…ĺaj , takunan , trajan , r~…ĺwa* kńßu Ē~ ° , mins…ô , * Ē~ °ujan , *uba Ē~ ° , kawabata , kańßa…ôńßa…ôoan , ŇčaŇčińßaw , siŇčaw , br~…ĺaŇčaw , ńß…ôku Ē~ ° , kukuŇč , mintuju , skaru , t Ē~ °apan , si Ē~ °uŇč . wuf…ôn (ta-wan) *** :Ňč* fuŇč* ńßioŇč*****:tatoba Ē~ °****:tatoba Ē~ °). wu ¶…ô buju Ē~ °, itida i wufun , ¶udun ¶…ô , paipuf…ôn sa kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a kitidaan, utajwan nu ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺasubu nu saka ¶a ¶aj a kajakajan a buju Ē~ °, wuf…ôn "tajwan ŇčajŇčaj a kamu u ńßaj-r~…ĺu a Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺan, Ňč* fuŇč* ńßioŇč*, atajar~…ĺ a mamu, tatoba Ē~ °, saisijat a kamu, tatoba Ē~ °". u tajwan sin- ¶uku nu ¶a ¶ajaj a san-ti nijadu Ē~ ° itida i sin- ¶uku nu nutipan, u sin- ¶uku nu saadidi Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw nu nijadu Ē~ °an, atu *iansńßi sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sin- ¶uku a santi nijadu Ē~ °an. mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw u tajwan jin ¶umin atajar~…ĺ atu saisijat , idaw ku adidiaj nu ŇčajŇčajan a bina ¶adan atu ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu ńßur~…ĺam mabur~…ĺawaj nu tajniaj a tad…ômaw. war~…ĺijan sibijaw tu *iansńßi , timur~…ĺan sibijaw tu miwr~…ĺi kin taj-an f…ôn , nutipan sibijaw tu miw-r~…ĺi kin nanzńßuaŇč , nutipan amisan katukuńß i amis sibijaw satu tu u paipu f…ôn , ¶udun ¶…ôn atu ńß…ôn-san nijadu Ē~ ° . wuf…ôŇč wuf…ôŇč ¶insan pakin ¶ar~…ĺan a kakitidaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nur~…ĺwan nu babar~…ĺaki. ¶in- ¶un pakin ¶ar~…ĺan ta ¶…ôn tusa a mińß ¶aan sia-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo masasuada ńß…ônaj, tajr~…ĺin ¶i pu ¶in-san-kuo tajr~…ĺan tajda itida mu…ôn…ôŇč. ta ¶…ôn s…ôpataj (*)a mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad (*) ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (**) a d…ômiad, ¶i ¶in-san-kuo tajr~…ĺan ku misab…ônisaj tu ŇčaŇčanan nu kitidaan nu kin ¶ar~…ĺ a paŇčaŇčan, patid…ôn tu ¶insan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kin ¶ar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa "********"kakin ¶ar~…ĺan nu kakitidaan. ta- ¶…ôn pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat a d…ômiad, misumad tu ¶in-san nu kin ¶ar~…ĺ kakitidaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° , ta- ¶…ôn sabaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, misumad tu ¶in-san kin ¶ar~…ĺ a kakitidaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, idaw kuni patid…ôŇč tu ¶un ¶a nu ¶a ¶aja a sakakaaj. nikudan ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, sumad ńßan tu ku ŇčaŇčan u ¶in- ¶un kin ¶ar~…ĺa kitidaan ńßan. sin- ¶u wuf…ôŇč ¶…ônjuŇč aidaŇčan sin- ¶u wuf…ôŇč ¶…ôn-juŇč aidaŇčan itida i sin- ¶u-ku wuf…ôŇč , u sakanamuńßan a tatajdaan amidaŇč. nu tajdaaj a midaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, idaw ku sananaj a mitan…ôŇčaj nu masa wawaaj ńß…ônaj nu masir~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj atu bar~…ĺakiaj tu mapur~…ĺuŇč a tajda atu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °anaj tajda mapur~…ĺuŇč midaŇč, ńßinuki nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mańßida miabibiaj tu baŇč…ôsis nu kir~…ĺaŇč. satabakiaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan u "tada Ē~ ° matum…ôs tu nu adipawnaj, mar~…ĺijud nu matum…ôsaj a r~…ĺat…ôm, ka ¶…ôr~…ĺaman nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ mańßida u ¶udad a kur~…ĺit" mańßida u tajwan a ¶ia-na-ta sin- ¶uku a "kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a tatajdaan nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan" baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu tatajdaan i pabaw tan…ôŇč miadińß tu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu masa babujbabujan nu r~…ĺat…ôn" tada ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs tu, ¶aaj tu kad…ôŇčan ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs!" ¶in ¶un wunsin a katin…ôŇčan ni sur~…ĺitan ¶in- ¶un uŇčsiŇč itida i sin- ¶u-ku wuf…ôn taw-san a nijadu Ē~ °an nu masa …ônar~…ĺaj a sasawa ¶an, u jun ¶umin u atajar~…ĺ atu saisijat nikapur~…ĺuŇčan a nijadu Ē~ °an, kar~…ĺiŇčatuan i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu(****), tawja nu dipun a zitaj nu i Ē~ °unsin a r~…ĺipun nu ki ¶ar~…ĺ a ¶ukajmasan, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " ¶in-san uŇčsiŇč ", saidawaj nu "uŇčsiŇč tatan…ôŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an" nuni kasiŇčaŇčanan u sin- ¶u-ku nu saka war~…ĺu a saka ¶a ¶aj nu aidaŇčan a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu tatajdaan. nu tajdaaj i wunsin nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, tan…ôŇč makajda i tusaaj nu mapa ¶a ¶uja a kajakajan , saka ¶a ¶aj a kajakaj tan…ôŇč makatukuńß i r~…ĺabu nu buju nu juŇč ¶umin a nijaduan, sakatusa a kajakajan b…ôsud sa katukuńß i ¶in ¶un wunsin, tan…ôŇč makatukuńß i tar~…ĺu r~…ĺindaw Ē~ °, mapatumi Ē~ ° nu sin ¶u-ku maar~…ĺa ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tatajdaan a midaŇč. ¶in- ¶un uŇčsiŇč saj ¶id…ôk nu nanum ¶in- ¶un uŇčsiŇč jadańß ku tańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ô sa nu buwakbuwak sananaj a n…ômn…ôm nu nanum, u akuti Ē~ ° nu nanum makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (**) ku akuti Ē~ °, u pńß nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin ńßan pitu. pitu ku nika ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminan, u nai Ē~ °aj ku kur~…ĺit nai Ē~ °aj ku san…ôk a nu t…ôban a tansuan uŇčsiŇč, idaw ku sananaj tan…ôŇč misa baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu bińß…ôd, misadit tu baŇč…ôs, mikudus tu udip sa. ¶in- ¶un uŇčsiŇč ami ¶a kunika kajdaan nu bar~…ĺad amar~…ĺawp…ôs, itidi i siwa tusa ¶a ¶aj (***) anika tabakijaj nu nin…ôr~…ĺ…ô mutańß…ôkar~…ĺ a ¶a, ajdaaj a ¶in- ¶un uŇčsiŇč nu tapaŇč nu tataŇčańßan r~…ĺawaan tu tu mukin ku panan kja madiput. jakuba Ē~ ° ńßan itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺat tuni kat…ôn…ôsan nu war~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan nu ¶in- ¶un wun ¶un mar~…ĺiŇčatu a ¶a pakatin…ôŇč tu binawr~…ĺan, idaw kuni patid…ôŇč tu ¶in ¶untan, katuudaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an, atu pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an. siapa Ē~ °aaidaŇčan a umańß tańß ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôm numasa bajubaju a r~…ĺad…ôm sia-pa Ē~ ° aaidaŇčan nu umańß sabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu kasi…ônawan aadińßan u masabajubajuaj nu r~…ĺad…ôm, itini inika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ u sakaadińßan nu tuki a maadińß, katukuńßan tu tina tukijan kan ¶a katuud tu ku tad…ômawan itida masir~…ĺa ¶ miadińß tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺat…ôm. munabawaj a r~…ĺad…ôm i baju nu tuŇčduńß mańßida u adidi Ē~ °aj a subar~…ĺ, dat…ôŇč…ôn nu mita mańßida mipa ¶unaaj tu bar~…ĺuŇča tu mir~…ĺakuud tu masakupa nu wan…ôŇč a pijaŇč a r~…ĺad…ôn mańßida Ē~ ° makatukuńßaj i nuajawan a dadipasan, bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ita mańßida maka tukuńßaj tu i batad. tańß ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman tu nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ma ¶unus ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu tapukuwaŇč, inikudan nu buju Ē~ ° u kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan a ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ńßamaw sa mar~…ĺa sumanańßaj ńßajmaw sa musar~…ĺuim…ôŇč r~…ĺaŇčdaw satu ku tapukuwan, tu d…ômid…ômiad mańßida umidiznaj kuni ka sumadan nu d…ômiad a puju kuni kadińß nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ u ka sa Ē~ °timan nu aadińßan. tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku tapukuwan r~…ĺabii i tida i aadińßan tu buna ¶ idaw ku mi ¶ujakuaj tu buna ¶a a musakamuaj. tawja a r~…ĺabii inai Ē~ °ku r~…ĺat…ômr~…ĺat…ôman, ńßatidaaj nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu tapukuwan itini i matamataan paadińß. ńßatiniaj tu a kapańß nu buna ¶, tada ńßatida tu ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. itini i kasi…ônawan nu r~…ĺabii a tapukuwan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj a mar~…ĺikataj nu buna ¶ mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin masa ¶a ¶aj a sasur~…ĺitan u r~…ĺ…ôińßu ¶u Ē~ ° a tat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an, kainaian nu r~…ĺad…ôm a r~…ĺabii, ńßatidaaj tu nu jadańß a buna ¶an adińßan katin…ôŇča tu kija masa ¶a ¶ajaj a buna ¶an. kasi…ônawan nu r~…ĺabii sar~…ĺikataj a buna ¶ ńßan u tinr~…ĺan a buna ¶?
S.FORM: Wufeng Wufeng a sakuwan ku Hsinchu. kumud nu kalesakan, 210.04 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 139.96 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 139.96 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 5,114 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,895 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,517 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 88% (Tayal, Saysiyat) ku kasabinawlan. u Atayal atu Saysiyat ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Wufeng mala 4 a cuwen atu 31 ku niyazu'. kina 31 a niyazu'sa, Maybalay , Kyu'ang , Oro'raw: , Mayl'ux , Mayhuman , R'ra' , Sipazi' , Tatoba' , Sansama:an , Sayie , Ip'ipa'an bato , Yohae' , Sansaru , Ulay , Takunan , Trayan , Lwax khu' , Minse , R'uyan , Ruba' , Kawabata , Kahaehaeoan , Ngangihaw , Singaw , Blangaw , Heku' , Kukung , Mintuyu , Skaru , T'apan , Si'ung . Wufen (Ta-wan) šļĒŚ≥įťĄČ :ngňä fungňč hiongňčÔľõś≥įťõÖŤ™ě:Tatoba'ÔľõŤ≥ĹŚ§ŹŤ™ě:Tatoba'). Wuce buyu', itida i Wufun , Cudunce , paipufen sa kalalitemuhan a kitidaan, uTaywan nu cacayay a lasubu nu sakacacay a kayakayan a buyu', Wufen "Taywan ngayngay a kamu u hay-lu a ngalngalan, ngňä fungňč hiongňč, Atayal a mamu, Tatoba', Saisiyat a kamu, Tatoba'". u Taywan Sin-cuku nu cacayay a san-ti niyadu' itida i Sin-cuku nu nutipan, u Sin-cuku nu saadidi'ay a tademaw nu niyadu'an, atu Jianshi sakalecad nu Sin-cuku a santi niyadu'an. muenengay a tademaw u Taywan yincumin Atayal atu Saisiyat , idaw ku adidiay nu ngayngayan a binacadan atu ni kalepacawan nu hulam mabulaway nu tayniay a tademaw. waliyan sibiyaw tu Jianshi , timulan sibiyaw tu Miwli kin tay-an fen , nutipan sibiyaw tu Miw-li kin Nanzhuang , nutipan amisan katukuh i amis sibiyaw satu tu u Paipu fen , Cudun cen atu Hen-san niyadu' . Wufeng Wufeng cinsan pakincalan a kakitidaan a luma' nulwan nu babalaki. Cin-cun pakincalan tacen tusa a mihcaan Sia-ke'-luo masasuada henay, taylin ci Pucin-san-kuo taylan tayda itida mueneng. tacen sepatay (4)a mihcaan enem a bulad (6) cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (15) a demiad, ci cin-san-kuo taylan ku misabenisay tu nganganan nu kitidaan nu kincal a pangangan, patiden tu cinsan a luma' nu kincal, mala "„ā∑„É§„āę„É≠ÔľćťöėŚčáÁ∑ö"kakincalan nu kakitidaan. ta-cen pulu' a mihcaan pitu a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a demiad, misumad tu Cin-san nu kincal kakitidaan a luma' , ta-cen sabaw cacay a mihcaan sepat a bulad cacay a demiad, misumad tu Cin-san kincal a kakitidaan nu lalumaan, idaw kuni patideng tu cunca nu cacaya a sakakaay. nikudan ni kalepacawan, sumad han tu ku ngangan u cin-cun kincala kitidaan han. Sin-cu Wufeng cenyung aidangan Sin-cu Wufeng Cen-yung aidangan itida i Sin-cu-ku Wufeng , u sakanamuhan a tataydaan amidang. nu taydaay a midangay nu tademaw, idaw ku sananay a mitanengay nu masa wawaay henay nu masiluma'ay atu balakiay tu mapulung a tayda atu laluma'anay tayda mapulung midang, hinuki nu kilakilangan mahida miabibiay tu bangesis nu kilang. satabakiay nu picidekan u "tada' matumes tu nu adipawnay, maliyud nu matumesay a latem, kacelaman nu cilal mahida u cudad a kulit" mahida u Taywan a Cia-na-ta Sin-cuku a "kilangkilangan a tataydaan nu caculilan" bangcal nu tataydaan i pabaw taneng miadih tu nikatahekalan nu cilal atu masa babuybabuyan nu laten" tada caledes tu, caay tu kadengan ku caledes!" cincun wunsin a katinengan ni sulitan cin-cun ungsing itida i Sin-cu-ku Wufen taw-san a niyadu'an nu masa enalay a sasawacan, u yuncumin u Atayal atu Saisiyat nikapulungan a niyadu'an, kalingatuan i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku tulu(1913), tawya nu dipun a zitay nu I'unsin a Lipun nu kical a cukaymasan, sisa pangangan han tu " cin-san ungsing ", saidaway nu "ungsing tatanengan a lalilucan" nuni kasinganganan u Sin-cu-ku nu saka walu a sakacacay nu aidangan a bangcal nu tataydaan. nu taydaay i wunsin nu midangay a tademaw, taneng makayda i tusaay nu mapacacuya a kayakayan , saka cacay a kayakay taneng makatukuh i labu nu buyu nu yungcumin a niyaduan, sakatusa a kayakayan besud sa katukuh i Cincun wunsin, taneng makatukuh i Talu lindaw', mapatumi' nu Sincu-ku maala ku balucu' nu tataydaan a midang. cin-cun ungsing saycidek nu nanum Cin-cun ungsing yadah ku tahekale sa nu buwakbuwak sananay a nemnem nu nanum, u akuti' nu nanum makaala tu sepat a bataan idaw ku walu (48) ku akuti', u PH nu cilemin han pitu. pitu ku nika cileminan, u nai'ay ku kulit nai'ay ku sanek a nu teban a tansuan ungsing, idaw ku sananay taneng misa bangcal tu bihed, misadit tu banges, mikudus tu udip sa. Cin-cun ungsing amica kunika kaydaan nu balad amalawpes, itidi i siwa tusa cacay (921) anika tabakiyay nu ninele mutahekal aca, aydaay a Cin-cun ungsing nu tapang nu tatangahan lawaan tu tu mukin ku panan kya madiput. yakuba' han itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2018) sabaw cacay a bulat tuni katenesan nu waluay a mihcaan nu Cin-cun wuncun malingatu aca pakatineng tu binawlan, idaw kuni patideng tu Cincuntan, katuuday a lalalilucan, atu payluma'an nu lalalilucan. siapa'aaidangan a umah tahcelem numasa bayubayu a ladem Sia-pa' aaidangan nu umah sabangcalay nu kasienawan aadihan u masabayubayuay nu ladem, itini inika tahekalan nu cilal atu kaceleman nu cilal u sakaadihan nu tuki a maadih, katukuhan tu tina tukiyan kanca katuud tu ku tademawan itida masilac miadih tu bangcal nu latem. munabaway a ladem i bayu nu tungduh mahida u adidi'ay a subal, datengen nu mita mahida mipacunaay tu balunga tu milakuud tu masakupa nu waneng a piyang a laden mahida' makatukuhay i nuayawan a dadipasan, balucu' ita mahida maka tukuhay tu i batad. tahceleman tu nu cilal macunus ku bangcal nu tapukuwang, inikudan nu buyu' u kalawlawan a cilal hamaw sa mala sumanahay haymaw sa musaluimeng langdaw satu ku tapukuwan, tu demidemiad mahida umidiznay kuni ka sumadan nu demiad a puyu kuni kadih nu bangcal u ka sa'timan nu aadihan. takelal ku tapukuwan labii i tida i aadihan tu bunac idaw ku micuyakuay tu bunaca a musakamuay. tawya a labii inai'ku latemlateman, hatidaay nu ahebal nu tapukuwan itini i matamataan paadih. hatiniay tu a kapah nu bunac, tada hatida tu ku bangcal. itini i kasienawan nu labii a tapukuwan idaw ku tuluay a malikatay nu bunac malalitin masa cacay a sasulitan u leihucu' a tatelacan, kainaian nu ladem a labii, hatidaay tu nu yadah a bunacan adihan katinenga tu kiya masa cacayay a bunacan. kasienawan nu labii salikatay a bunac han u tinlan a bunac?
S.PHON: wuf…ôŇč wuf…ôŇč a sakuwan ku ńßsin ¶ńßu. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺin-pan-ti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu paw-r~…ĺiw-ti ***.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **% (tajar~…ĺ, sajsijat) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u atajar~…ĺ atu sajsijat ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan wuf…ôŇč mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, majbar~…ĺaj , kju Ē~ °aŇč , oro Ē~ °raw: , majr~…ĺ Ē~ °u* , majńßuman , * Ē~ °ra Ē~ ° , sipazi Ē~ ° , tatoba ŇčaŇčińßaw , siŇčaw , br~…ĺaŇčaw , ńß…ôku Ē~ ° , kukuŇč , mintuju , skaru , t Ē~ °apan , si Ē~ °uŇč . wuf…ôn (ta-wan) *** :Ňč* fuŇč* ńßioŇč*****:tatoba Ē~ °****:tatoba Ē~ °). wu ¶…ô buju Ē~ °, itida i , u sakanamuńßan a tatajdaan amidaŇč. nu tajdaaj a midaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, idaw ku sananaj a mitan…ôŇčaj nu masa wawaaj ńß…ônaj nu masir~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj atu bar~…ĺakiaj tu mapur~…ĺuŇč a tajda atu nu aadińßan. tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku tapukuwan r~…ĺabii i tida i aadińßan tu buna ¶ idaw ku mi ¶ujakuaj tu buna ¶a a musakamuaj. tawja a r~…ĺabii inai Ē~ °ku r~…ĺat…ômr~…ĺat…ôman, ńßatidaaj nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu tapukuwan itini i matamataan paadińß. ńßatiniaj tu a kapańß nu buna ¶, tada ńßatida tu ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. itini i kasi…ônawan nu r~…ĺabii a tapukuwan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj a mar~…ĺikataj nu buna ¶ mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin masa ¶a ¶aj a sasur~…ĺitan u r~…ĺ…ôińßu ¶u Ē~ ° a tat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an, kainaian nu r~…ĺad…ôm a r~…ĺabii, ńßatidaaj tu nu jadańß a buna ¶an adińßan katin…ôŇča tu kija masa ¶a ¶ajaj a buna ¶an. kasi…ônawan nu r~…ĺabii sar~…ĺikataj a buna ¶ ńßan u tinr~…ĺan a buna ¶?
